character_dossiers.name: my mother
character_dossiers.biography: A woman who retrieves a key from a dead captain's body and counts stolen money, insisting on her due despite danger.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A first-person narrator who assists his mother in retrieving stolen goods and escaping pursuers.

character_dossiers.name: the blind man
character_dossiers.biography: A blind individual who commands others to search for stolen goods and confronts intruders.

character_dossiers.name: Pew
character_dossiers.biography: A character who issues aggressive orders and curses during a search for stolen goods.

character_dossiers.name: Bill
character_dossiers.biography: A deceased captain whose body is searched for stolen items and whose death is reported.

character_dossiers.name: Dirk
character_dossiers.biography: A character mentioned in the context of a signal and a threat from the blind man.
